word: H2119 - זָחַל - zâchal - zaw-khal' - Be afraid

sections.paragraph:
Original: זחל

Transliteration: zâchal

Phonetic: zaw-khal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to shrink back, crawl away
    1. (Qal) crawling, creeping (participle) (metonymy)
  2. to fear, be afraid

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 545

Part(s) of speech: Verb
